intro.headline: We Believe Every Driver Deserves Dignity, Recognition, and a Professional Identity.

story.headlineHtml: A Bridge of Work. A Bridge of Dignity.
story.vision: India where every driver — whether behind the wheel of a taxi, a ministry vehicle, or a household car — is a certified, trusted, and dignified service professional.
story.mission: To design and deploy India's first national soft skills and behavioural certification framework for drivers — structured, scalable, mobile-first, and built to last.
story.descriptionHtml:
Karam means work. Setu means bridge.
KaramSetu is a bridge — between where India's drivers are today and where they deserve to be. Between informal labour and certified professionalism. Between low recognition and earned respect. Between a system that only measures complaints and one that actively builds capability.

values.headlineHtml: The Beliefs That Drive Everything We Do

items.title: Dignity of Labour
items.desc: Every driver who completes our program is not just better trained. They are more respected — by passengers, by platforms, and by themselves.

items.title: Systemic Change Over One-Time Training
items.desc: A single workshop changes nothing. KaramSetu is designed to institutionalise behavioural standards — making professionalism continuous and measurable.

items.title: Inclusion by Design
items.desc: Our platform is built for India's real workforce — those with limited literacy, inconsistent internet access, and no time to attend classrooms.

items.title: Trust as Infrastructure
items.desc: Trust is built through training, certification, and consistent standards — and sustained over time.

roadmap.description: KaramSetu will be rolled out in six structured phases — beginning with a pilot in 2–3 major cities and scaling to a nationwide certification standard by Year 5.
phases: Phase 1 — Pilot with 5,000 drivers across 2–3 cities
Phase 2 — Integration with aggregators across 5 metro cities
Phase 4 — Private and household driver segment, Tier-2 cities
Phase 5 & 6 — Multi-state scale-up and national institutionalisation
roadmap.goal: 9 Lakh+ certified drivers. One national standard. A transformed mobility workforce.

team.headlineHtml: Built by People Who Believe in the Work.

partners.description: KaramSetu partners with aggregators, government bodies, and CSR organisations to build a structured and scalable driver certification ecosystem.

categories.title: Cab Aggregators & Mobility Platforms
categories.desc: Integrate certification into onboarding, reduce complaints, and build trust.

categories.title: Government & Ministry Bodies
categories.desc: Align with national policies and enable large-scale adoption.

categories.title: CSR & Corporate Partners
categories.desc: Fund driver cohorts and measure social impact.

cta.headlineHtml: The Road to a Certified India Starts Here.
cta.description: Whether you are a driver, a government body, or a company — KaramSetu has a place for you.
